task: Review AR aging across branches each morning and prioritize collection contacts for accounts entering 30-, 60-, or 90-day past-due buckets.
tool_today: RentalMan AR aging reports, spreadsheet tracker, phone, email
decision_content: Which accounts need immediate action, what contact path fits the relationship, and when an overdue balance becomes an escalation.

task: Process new customer credit applications, evaluate creditworthiness, and set or update limits and payment terms in the customer record.
tool_today: RentalMan customer account screens, credit bureau or trade-reference data, branch request email
decision_content: Whether to approve, decline, or condition the account and how much risk the business should accept to support the sale.

task: Audit the daily billing batch and resolve rate, duration, charge, or billing-cycle exceptions before invoices are released.
frequency: every business day before billing release
tool_today: RentalMan billing module, contract records, branch email, phone
decision_content: Which exceptions can be corrected centrally, which need branch clarification, and whether an invoice should be held or released.

task: Send preliminary notices and maintain state-specific lien-right deadline tracking for project-based contracts.
frequency: per new project account plus ongoing deadline monitoring
tool_today: RentalMan contract records, notice-tracking software or spreadsheet, email or certified mail
decision_content: Which contracts need notice, which state rules apply, and whether the record is complete enough to preserve lien rights on time.

task: Issue and track lien waivers alongside incoming payments and confirm supporting waivers are complete before receivables are closed.
frequency: aligned to payment cycles and closeouts
tool_today: RentalMan payment records, waiver templates, email, manual tracking or lien software
decision_content: Whether the waiver scope and amount are correct, what type of waiver is appropriate, and whether enough supporting documentation is in hand to release it.

task: Investigate customer billing disputes and issue corrections, credits, or documented rejections with branch follow-up as needed.
frequency: multiple per day around billing cycles
tool_today: RentalMan billing history, contract records, phone, email
decision_content: Whether the dispute is valid, what adjustment amount is warranted, and whether the issue reflects a branch process problem that needs escalation.

task: Assemble the weekly DSO and AR aging dashboard and flag accounts whose risk or bucket position is worsening.
tool_today: RentalMan AR reports, Excel or BI dashboard, email
decision_content: Which accounts merit explicit commentary and which trends are material enough to surface to finance leadership.

task: Escalate severely delinquent accounts to collections, notice-of-intent, or mechanics-lien filing before recovery options expire.
tool_today: RentalMan account history, collections contacts, lien-filing tool, legal counsel email
decision_content: When the account has crossed the threshold for formal escalation and which legal or collections path best protects recovery.
